name: Starlight Mint Surprise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend sugars, margarine, water, vanilla and eggs until well mixed.
2. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda and salt; mix well.
4. Add sugar mixture; mix at low speed until well blended.
5. Cover; refrigerate at least 2 hours for easier handling.
6. Heat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Using about 1 tablespoon of dough, press around each candy wafer to cover completely.
8. Place cookies 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Top each with a walnut half.
10. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 7 to 9 minutes, or until golden brown.
